ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial instrument */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial instrument */,
  "rate" REAL /* Interest rate percentage */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days between start and end date */,
  "day_count_convention" TEXT /* Day count convention used for interest calculation */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Calculated interest rate based on the day count convention */,
  "financial_product_type" TEXT /* Type of financial product (e.g., bond, loan, derivative) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* The entity that issued the financial instrument */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* The credit rating of the issuer */,
  "face_value" REAL /* The nominal or face value of the financial instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the financial instrument is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the instrument's details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "day_count_conventions" (
  "convention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day count convention */,
  "convention_name" TEXT /* Name of the day count convention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the day count convention */,
  "formula" TEXT /* A mathematical formula or description of how the day count is calculated */,
  "industry_standard" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the convention is an industry standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("convention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rate_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate calculation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "convention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day count convention */,
  "calculated_rate" REAL /* Calculated interest rate */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* The date when the interest rate calculation was performed */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used for the interest rate calculation */,
  "additional_parameters" TEXT /* Any additional parameters used in the calculation (e.g., compounding frequency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rate_calculations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rate_calculations_convention_id FOREIGN KEY ("convention_id") REFERENCES day_count_conventions ("convention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, risk manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department to which the user belongs */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON field to store user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, calculate) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., interest rate analysis, risk assessment) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* The title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasted_rates" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate forecast */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "predicted_rate" REAL /* Predicted interest rate */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the forecasted rate */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* The model used for forecasting (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasted_rates_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of historical data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date for which the historical rate is recorded */,
  "historical_rate" REAL /* Historical interest rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the historical data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* A rating or score indicating the reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
